title: SendGrid vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: SendGrid vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between SendGrid and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. SendGrid is built for developers and high-volume senders, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. SendGrid wins for developers and high-volume senders, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, SendGrid or Postmark?
faq.a: Postmark starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to SendGrid?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
